geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World - 3D block-based math explorer. Use WASD to move, mouse to look, left-click to break blocks, right-click to place blocks.
print_a_card_to_build_this_structure_w: Print a card to build this structure with physical cubes
student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Student home language for bilingual NPC speech
student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Student home language — NPCs will speak bilingually
export_structures_as_stl_file_for_3d_p: Export structures as STL file for 3D printing
capture_a_screenshot_of_your_world_sav: Capture a screenshot of your world (saves to downloads)
print_companion_worksheet_for_this_les: Print companion worksheet for this lesson
import_a_world_from_json_file: Import a world from JSON file
export_session_analytics_as_csv_for_re: Export session analytics as CSV for research
export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Export MTSS progress monitoring report (RTI tier classification, longitudinal data)
share_this_world_to_the_class_library: Share this world to the class library
describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Describe a geometry lesson topic for AI generation
generation_depth_number_of_ai_passes: Generation depth: number of AI passes
refine_make_it_harder_add_more_npcs_ch: Refine: "Make it harder" / "Add more NPCs" / "Change theme to ocean"...
edit_the_raw_lesson_json_manually: Edit the raw lesson JSON manually
npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: NPC compass strip showing relative direction to each NPC from camera facing
close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Close all open overlays and return to the game view
close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Close all overlays & return to the 3D game (or press Shift+Esc)
what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: What should the NPC say? (e.g. "Look at the structure behind me!")
answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Answer choices, separated by pipe character
answers_separated_by_e_g_24_units_12_u: Answers separated by | (e.g. 24 units|12 units|36 units)
clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Clear only YOUR placed blocks (lesson structures stay). Useful for restarting an experiment.
skip_tutorial_and_proceed_to_lesson: Skip tutorial and proceed to lesson
what_was_the_most_interesting_thing_yo: What was the most interesting thing you discovered? What strategy helped you solve problems?
click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Click to hear translation spoken aloud
translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Translate this dialogue with AI (uses an AI request)
ask_the_ai_for_a_hint: Ask the AI for a hint
hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, I’m having trouble thinking right now. Try asking in a different way!
